description: Requesting Box access to the Beacon Spring Campaign asset folder so I can upload the finalized brand kit and lettering exports for review.

description: Figma SSO via Okta is prompting for re-auth on every load. Cannot stay signed in to hand off the homepage redesign frames. Started after the morning maintenance window.

description: Confluence space for the rebrand project is read-only for my vendor account. I need comment access to respond to feedback threads from the creative team.

description: Beacon staging storefront is not loading the new web font from the CDN. Glyphs fall back to system serif on the campaign landing page. Need this fixed before the stakeholder preview.

description: Zoom recording of the brand review session has not appeared in the shared folder. Vendor needs the recording to compile revision notes.

description: Asana task notifications for the rebrand board stopped arriving by email. Missing handoff pings from the creative team.

description: Need a temporary guest Slack channel invite for the print vendor coordinating the holiday packaging run. Scope to the packaging project only.

description: Okta MFA push is not arriving on my vendor account during morning login. Had to fall back to the backup code twice this week.

description: Homepage hero image is rendering blurry on the production storefront after the latest deploy. Source asset is high resolution; suspect the image pipeline is over-compressing.
